nasb.text: When she recognized Peter’s voice, because of her joy she did not open the gate, but ran in and announced that Peter was standing in front of the gate.

esv.text: Recognizing Peter’s voice, in her joy she did not open the gate but ran in and reported that Peter was standing at the gate.

cnv.text: 她認出是彼得的聲音，歡喜到顧不得開門，就跑進去報告，說彼得站在門外。

ccb.text: 她听出是彼得的声音，喜出望外，竟然没有开门就跑进去告诉大家：“彼得在门外！”

csbs.text: 她一认出是彼得的声音，就高兴得顾不上打开门，跑进去告诉大家说，彼得站在门外。
